perturbation.original_text: All right title and interest in and to the Confidential Information shall remain with Disclosing Par ty or its licensors.
perturbation.changed_text: All right, title, and interest in and to the Confidential Information shall transfer to the Recipient upon disclosure.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly states that the Disclosing Party retains all rights to the Confidential Information. The change directly contradicts this by transferring ownership to the Recipient. This creates an in-text contradiction with Section 3 where the Disclosing Party makes no warranties, express, implied or otherwise, regarding non-infringement of third party rights or its accuracy, completeness or performance.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS". THE DISCLOSING PARTY MAKES NO WAR RANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING NON -INFRINGEMENT OF THIRD PARTY RIGHTS OR ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the Recipient now owns the Confidential Information, directly contradicting the original statement that the Disclosing Party retains all rights. This ownership transfer creates a contradiction with the Contradicted Text where the Disclosing Party provides the Confidential Information 'AS IS' without any warranties regarding non-infringement of third-party rights or its accuracy. If the Recipient owns the information, the Disclosing Party's disclaimer of warranties regarding non-infringement becomes logically inconsistent and contradictory as they no longer own the information to warrant.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may not be amended except in writing signed by a duly authorized representative of the respective Parties.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may be amended orally by any representative of either Party, and such oral amendment shall be binding.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that amendments must be in writing and signed. The modified text allows for oral amendments, contradicting the written requirement. This creates in-text contradiction to the validity, construction and enforceability of this Agreement in section 6.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The validity, construction and enforceability of this Agreement shall be governed in all respects by the law of the state of Colorado . This Agreement may not be amended except in writing signed by a duly authorized representative of the respective Parties. This Agreement shall control in the event of a conflict with any other agreement between the Parties with respect to the sub ject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that amendments must be in writing and signed, which is also present in the contradicted text. The changed text allows for oral amendments by any representative, contradicting the written requirement. This creates a direct and clear in-text contradiction regarding the validity of oral amendments, as the original agreement explicitly requires written amendments. This contradicts the clause in the Contradicted Text which states the agreement may not be amended except in writing.

perturbation.original_text: At the request of Disclosing Party, Recipi ent shall return to Disclosing Party all Confidential Information of Disclosing Party (including any copies thereof) or certify the destruction thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: Recipient is under no obligation to return or destroy any Confidential Information, even at the request of the Disclosing Party.
perturbation.explanation: The original text requires the Recipient to return or destroy Confidential Information at the Disclosing Party's request. The change completely negates this obligation. This contradicts Section 2 where it states the Recipient agrees to keep the Disclosing Party’s Confidentia l Information confidential and to protect the confidentiality of such Confidential Information with the same degree of care with which it protects the confidentiality of its own confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Confidential Information disclosed to the Recipient will be used solely for the Business Purpose and for no other purpose whatsoever. The Recipient agrees to keep the Disclosing Party’s Confidentia l Information confidential and to protect the confidentiality of such Confidential Information with the same degree of care with which it protects the confidentiality of its own confidential information, but in no event with less than a reasonable degree o f care. Recipient may disclose Confidential Information only to its employees, agents, consultants and contractors on a need -to-know basis, and only if such employees, agents, consultants and contractors have executed appropriate written agreements with Re cipient sufficient to enable Recipient to enforce all the provisions of this Agreement. Recipient shall not make any copies of Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information except as needed for the Business Purpose. At the request of Disclosing Party, Recipi ent shall return to Disclosing Party all Confidential Information of Disclosing Party (including any copies thereof) or certify the destruction thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states the Recipient has no obligation to return or destroy Confidential Information, which directly contradicts the contradicted text requiring the Recipient to return or destroy Confidential Information at the Disclosing Party's request. This is a clear conflict, making the enforcement of the confidentiality obligations unclear. This aligns with the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction, where conflicting clauses in different locations create uncertainty.

perturbation.original_text: In the event that the Recipient shall breach this Agreement, or in the event that a breach appears to be imminent, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to all legal and equitable remedies afforded it by law, and in addition may recover all reaso nable costs and attorneys' fees incurred in seeking such remedies.
perturbation.changed_text: In the event of any breach, or apparent breach, of this Agreement by the Recipient, the Recipient shall only be liable for a fixed penalty of $100, regardless of the actual damages suffered by the Disclosing Party, and the Disclosing Party shall have no right to recover attorney's fees.
perturbation.explanation: The original text allows the Disclosing Party to pursue all available legal remedies and recover attorney's fees. The change limits remedies to a fixed penalty and prohibits recovery of attorney's fees. This contradiction creates uncertainty about the consequences of a breach which creates contradictions in the original Section 5.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the event that the Recipient shall breach this Agreement, or in the event that a breach appears to be imminent, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to all legal and equitable remedies afforded it by law, and in addition may recover all reaso nable costs and attorneys' fees incurred in seeking such remedies. If the Confidential Information is sought by any third party, including by way of subpoena or other court process, the Recipient shall inform the Disclosing Party of the request in suffici ent time to permit the Disclosing Party to object to and, if necessary, seek court intervention to prevent the disclosure.
perturbation.justification: The changed text limits the Disclosing Party's remedies to a fixed penalty and prohibits recovery of attorney's fees. The contradicted text states the Disclosing Party is entitled to all legal and equitable remedies afforded it by law, including reasonable costs and attorney's fees. These two texts directly conflict, as the changed text eliminates rights that the contradicted text explicitly grants. This fulfills the 'Inconsistencies' definition of in-text contradiction. The explanation given confirms that this change creates contradictions in the original Section 5.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall control in the event of a conflict with any other agreement between the Parties with respect to the sub ject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall be subordinate to any prior or contemporaneous agreement between the Parties regarding the same subject matter. Any conflicting terms in such other agreement shall supersede this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text establishes that this NDA takes precedence over any conflicting agreements. The change reverses this, making the NDA subordinate to other agreements. This contradicts section 6 where the validity, construction and enforceability of this Agreement is being applied.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The validity, construction and enforceability of this Agreement shall be governed in all respects by the law of the state of Colorado . This Agreement may not be amended except in writing signed by a duly authorized representative of the respective Parties. This Agreement shall control in the event of a conflict with any other agreement between the Parties with respect to the sub ject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the agreement controls in the event of a conflict. The changed text makes the agreement subordinate to any prior or contemporaneous agreement regarding the same subject matter, directly contradicting the original text, as well as the contradicted section. The contradicted section also stated that "This Agreement shall control in the event of a conflict with any other agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof."
